title: Write data from Microsoft Excel back to Databricks ​
body:
**June 4, 2026**

Use the Databricks Excel Add-in to write data from Microsoft Excel back to a Unity Catalog table. Create a new table or overwrite an existing table in Databricks without leaving Excel. See [Write data back to Databricks using the Databricks Excel Add-in](/aws/en/integrations/excel-write-back).
